methods.description: Process for carrying out structural measurements in various parts of the sand pit to determine stress orientations and bedding dip measurements.

steps.description: Structural measurements were carried out in various parts of the sand pit.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct structural measurements in sand pit

steps.description: Kinematic indicators like slickenlines were measured in the marls.
Stress orientations are inferred with some uncertainty from MOHR pairs.
steps.searchable_summary: infer stress orientations using MOHR pairs

steps.description: Bedding dip measurements have uncertainties especially in case of the sand layers above the unconformity and in the uppermost, gently dipping beds below it.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze bedding dip measurements with uncertainties

steps.description: Stereoplots are lower hemisphere SCHMIDT projections.

methods.description: Dating deformation events using biostratigraphy, primarily based on mollusks endemic to Lake Pannon.

steps.description: Deformation events were dated by biostratigraphy, mostly by mollusks, based on the endemic species of Lake Pannon.
steps.searchable_summary: date deformation events using mollusk biostratigraphy

steps.description: Systematic collection of mollusks was carried out in the Pannonian calcareous marls.
steps.searchable_summary: collect mollusks from Pannonian calcareous marls

steps.description: In the limonitic sands, most mollusks came from the industrial sieving of the sands.
steps.searchable_summary: collect mollusks from limonitic sands via sieving

steps.description: Collecting campaigns targeted tectonically interesting parts of the sand pit.
